name: Terms and Conditions
acceptance: By using Noto, you agree to these Terms.
service_description: Noto is a markdown-based note-taking application with optional cloud collaboration features.

accounts.requirement: Users may need to create an account to access certain features.
accounts.responsibility: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account.

user_content.ownership: Users retain ownership of their notes.
user_content.responsibility: Users are responsible for the content they create and share.
user_content.storage: Notes are stored locally unless the user enables collaboration features.

acceptable_use: Do not use the service for illegal activities
Do not attempt to hack or disrupt the service
Do not upload harmful or malicious content

payments.terms: All payments are processed securely via Stripe.
payments.refund_policy: All sales are final. No refunds will be issued.

service_availability: We do not guarantee uninterrupted service and may modify or discontinue features at any time.

termination.by_user: Users may stop using the service at any time.
termination.by_service: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

limitation_of_liability: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for data loss, service interruptions, or damages.
changes: We may update these Terms. Continued use means acceptance of the updated Terms.
